description.en: Fetches Eurostat LAU (Local Administrative Unit) human population data for the given countries and focus year via GISCO, reprojected to EPSG:3035 (R function 'get_lau_population'). This process is used for both the population focus year and the reference year by supplying a different year value. GISCO's LAU boundaries don't cover every country for every year (e.g. the UK is missing from the 2021 vintage); if a requested country has no LAU data for focus_year, the nearest year (by proximity) that does have data for that country is used instead, and that country's population columns are relabeled to focus_year so the output always has a consistent 'POP_<focus_year>' column. A message is printed whenever this substitution happens.

inputFile1_countries_rds.title: Countries for catchment
inputFile1_countries_rds.description: Path to an .rds file containing the list of country codes for which to fetch LAU population data.

focus_year.title: Focus year
focus_year.description: The year for which to fetch LAU population data. Allowed years are 2011 through 2024.

lau_focus.title: LAU population data
lau_focus.description: LAU (Local Administrative Unit) polygons with observed population for the requested countries and year, reprojected to EPSG:3035.

focusyear.title: Focus year (echoed)
focusyear.description: The requested focus year, saved as a single value for use in subsequent pipeline steps.
